lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to validate the AX loadout, military-slot fit and power/capacitor budget.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Alliance Crusader ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, the three military-slot count and module-variant data behind the AX reinforcement plan.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Alliance Crusader shipyard page — hull stats, hardpoints, price, and the no-rank access used in the AX cost section.

sources.label: Fandom
sources.what: Alliance Crusader hull profile and SLF/role overview, cross-referenced against AX weapon class limits.
